title: Smoky Chicken Blanquette
description: A French-inspired dish with smoky flavors and tender chicken. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
3. In a large Dutch oven, cook the diced bacon over medium heat until crispy.
4. Add the sliced onions to the pot and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
5. Add the sliced mushrooms to the pot and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
6. Add the chicken to the pot and brown on all sides.
7. Add the white wine to the pot and cook until it is almost completely reduced.
8. Add the chicken broth to the pot and bring to a simmer.
9. Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
11. Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the heavy cream.
12. Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with fresh thyme.
